qa_pairs.question: I don’t see the answer to my account renewal question in this FAQ. Who do I go to for help?
qa_pairs.answer: Please send an email to renewals@tech.alliancecan.ca so that we can assist you with your request.

qa_pairs.question: I am a faculty member. What happens if I don’t renew my account by the deadline?
qa_pairs.answer: Any active account that is not renewed between May 6 and June 9, 2026, will expire and be automatically deactivated after that date. Note, however, that accounts can be reactivated at any time, even after they have been deactivated.
